description_long: This is a short sword with a straight, double-edged black blade that tapers to a sharp point. The hilt features a blue handle with gold accents, including two decorative gold bands and a hexagonal pommel with an ornate design. The crossguard is also gold, providing both protection and a visual contrast to the dark blade. The handle appears to be wrapped or textured for grip, and the overall design suggests a ceremonial or high-status weapon. The materials and craftsmanship indicate durability and attention to detail, with a blend of functional and decorative elements. No sheath is present, and the sword is compact enough for one-handed use.
description: A short, straight-bladed sword with a black blade, blue and gold handle, and ornate gold accents. The design is both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the black blade, blue handle, and gold crossguard and pommel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the blade, handle, and gold accents visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and the handle's blue and gold detailing.
attribute_handle_design: straight, blue with gold bands, hexagonal pommel, textured or wrapped grip
